sub_sims.s_expr:
(sub-sim
          (begin
            (define candidates (filter (lambda (r) (> (nth r 1) 10)) my-relationships))
            (define best (if (empty? candidates) my-id (nth (car candidates) 0)))

diary_entries.entry: Another year. Subsurface ice deposit found. The colony feels hopeful. My paranoia grows stronger.
